# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                use_remote_address: true
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                request_timeout: 30s
                stream_idle_timeout: 300s
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 300s
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                route_config:
                  name: api_gateway_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: backend_services
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/"
                          route:
                            cluster: backend_service_v1
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,gateway-error
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v2/"
                          route:
                            cluster: backend_service_v2
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,gateway-error
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/auth/"
                          route:
                            cluster: auth_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,gateway-error
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: frontend_service
                            timeout: 30s
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: backend_service_v1
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: backend_service_v1
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: backend-v1
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 300s
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive: {}
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1000
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 5000
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
          upstream_http_protocol_options:
            auto_sni: false
      upstream_connection_pool_options:
        tcp_pool:
          max_connections: 200
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: backend_service_v2
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: backend_service_v2
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: backend-v2
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 300s
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive: {}
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1000
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 5000

      health_checks:

          healthy_threshold: 2

            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      typed_extension_protocol_options:

          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
          upstream_http_protocol_options:
            auto_sni: false
      upstream_connection_pool_options:
        tcp_pool:
          max_connections: 200
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: auth_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 3s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: auth_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: auth-service
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 120s
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive: {}
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 500
            max_pending_requests: 500
            max_requests: 2000
            max_retries: 2
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 120s
          upstream_http_protocol_options:
            auto_sni: false
      upstream_connection_pool_options:
        tcp_pool:
          max_connections: 100
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: frontend_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: frontend_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:

                  address:

                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:

      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1000
            max_pending_requests: 1000

      health_checks:

          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2

            expected_statuses:

                end: 300
      typed_extension_protocol_options:

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
